ILLAOI_CHARACTER.title: Illaoi
ILLAOI_CHARACTER.cardsModifierDescriptio: Only Illaoi cards appear in rewards.
ILLAOI_CHARACTER.eventDeathPrevention: The Great Kraken has not permitted me to fall.
ILLAOI_CHARACTER.description:
A devoted priestess from the deep seas of Bilgewater.
Amid the echoes of tide and god, she drives all unworthy things from these waters.
